# COMMITTEE ON ETHICS
## FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE EXTENSION REQUEST FORM

**Name of Requestor:** Rohit Khanna  
**Date:** April 11, 2023

**Employing Member/Committee/Office:** CA-17

**Financial Disclosure Statement Type:**  
- [X] Annual (CY 2022)
- [ ] Candidate
- [ ] New Employee
- [ ] Termination

**The length of time for which extension is requested (check one):**  
- [ ] 30 days
- [ ] 60 days
- [X] 90 days
- [ ] Other: (blank)

## For Ethics Committee Use Only

**Days Submitted:** 90  
**Total days requested exceed 90:** (not checked)

Request for extension of due date is granted for filing by 8/13/2023. If more than one extension is requested, an additional request must be filed before the current due date.

Dated: 5/18/2023

uncertainties.read: page rotated/low contrast; some administrative text in the lower half is difficult to read
uncertainties.note: core request fields and 90-day extension checkbox are legible
date read from Committee Use Only section; scan is noisy
